text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's Air Shakur. Everyone has their eye on her as
the most likely winner for the Hopeful Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: She certainly doesn't look very "hopeful." I wonder what it is she wants.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur hasn't exactly endeared herself to the
fans since her debut, but she has been attracting
more and more attention from them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And whatever they say about her, she's
completely unaffected.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Closing this seven-centimeter gap'll snuff out
the noise.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
No matter who's lookin' at 'em, numbers are a
clear, objective proof that anyone can
understand.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The simulation went perfectly. Now I just have to
recreate the same conditions...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I don't think the data you brought me's gonna
have much bearing on the results, though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I've been wondering what she did with the data I gave her on unquantifiable influences, but it looks like she is using it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If people want to take up all the oxygen in the
room makin' noise, then I'll just keep
brainstorming solutions till the very last second.
